title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: xAI has trained a 1.5 trillion-parameter Grok 5 model reportedly using developer workflow data to enable coding capabilities. The model is positioned as part of xAI's push into AI-assisted software development through Grok Build and terminal-based programming agents.
